gameplay.note: Solid wave-survival loop with clear shooting feedback, still early in enemy variety.

controls.note: Responsive WASD, mouse aim, and keyboard-fire fallback work well in browser tests.

visualClarity.note: Neon arena and HUD are readable, though effects can get busy during close fights.

performance.note: Lightweight prototype runs smoothly in the Playwright smoke path.

replayability.note: Score chasing and waves invite retries, but progression is still limited.

agentSelfTestQuality.note: Smoke tests cover arcade discovery, startup, movement, firing, enemies, HUD, and artifacts.
